shared_surface: CLI sources, doctor inventory, output/error strings, and CLI goldens; build facts and reference contracts are read-only M0-002 interfaces.
deliverables: Real orus --version and orus doctor; exact seven-row inventory; typed JSON/exit/stream behavior; host-fact collection; atomic bounded rendering; syscall-access, claim, resource, negative-row, and 100-run repeatability tests.
spec_refs: CLI-FR-001, CLI-FR-002, CLI-FR-003, CLI-FR-004, CLI-FR-005, CLI-FR-006, CLI-FR-007, CLI-FR-008, CLI-FR-009, CLI-FR-010, CLI-NFR-001, CLI-NFR-002, CLI-NFR-003, CLI-NFR-004, CLI-NFR-005
verify: nix develop --command bazel test --config=dev //tests/cli/... && nix develop --command bazel test --config=asan //tests/cli/... && nix develop --command bazel test --config=ubsan //tests/cli/...
